headline: Quantization broke out across inference and diffusion work as multi-agent systems became the month's dominant build pattern.
body: Quantization led the window as both a top mover and a breakout, with NVIDIA combining dynamic quantization, latent chunk caching, and student-teacher distillation to cut diffusion denoising from fifty steps to as few as one for near real-time video on Blackwell B200. KV cache quantization moved alongside it, reinforcing efficiency as the through-line. Multi-agent systems recurred across new items: Google demonstrated ADK and Agent2Agent coordination for game building, IBM surfaced Kagenti for identity-based multi-agent security, and Tencent shipped WorkBuddy with 100-plus expert agents. New entrants MCP, RAG, knowledge graphs, and design systems appeared alongside an iframe sandbox, same-origin policy, and srcdoc cluster, while Satya Nadella published an essay on building frontier ecosystems.
